summary_text: 以下の方針で設計します。 目標: `Notion` を編集SSOTとして保ちながら、Supabaseでは「Notion編集内容との差分検知」「引用元トラッキング」「投稿ライフサイクル管理」を正規化データとして保持する。 想定対象: x-auto quote/lead 切替（`x-auto-contract`）を前提に、`quoted-author`（引用元作成者）を追跡可能にする。 参照前提: [docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md), [docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md), [skills](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md), [skills](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md). ```sql create type xauto_post_mode as enum ('lead_note', 'quote_reply', 'quote_reference_only', 'other'); create type xauto_workflow_state as enum ( 'discovered','notion_synced','needs_sync','ready_review','approved', 'scheduled','posting','posted','failed_validation','failed_publish', 'manually_posted','deleted_on_platform','archived' ); create type xauto_validation_result as enum ('pass','warn','fail'); create type xauto_quote_credibility as enum ('self_reported','parsed','verified', 'manual'); create table public.xauto_post ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), notion_page_id uuid not null unique, notion_page_url text, mode xauto_post_mode not null default 'other', notion_status_snapshot text not null, notion_scheduled_snapshot timestamptz, notion_body_sha256 char(64), notion_body_ja_sha256 char(64), notion_source_urls_sha256 char(64), notion_image_url text, notion_last_edited_at timestamptz, notion_sync_at timestamptz not null default now(), notion_sync_token text, local_state xauto_workflow_state not null default 'discovered', local_state_updated_at timestamptz not null default now(), platform_status text, last_platform_post_id text, last_platform_posted_at timestamptz, runtime_lock uuid, created_at timestamptz not null default now(), updated_at timestamptz not null default now(), deleted_at timestamptz, check (mode <> 'lead_note' or notion_status_snapshot in ('draft','approved','scheduled','posted','published')), check (char_length(notion_status_snapshot) between 1 and 60) ); create table public.xauto_post_source ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), post_id uuid not null references public.xauto_post(id) on delete cascade, source_url text not null, normalized_source_url text not null, source_position smallint not null default 0, is_canonical boolean not null default false, source_channel text not null default 'source_urls_field', appears_in_body boolean not null default false, appears_in_quote_url boolean not null default false, extracted_at timestamptz not null default now(), created_at timestamptz not null default now(), unique (post_id, normalized_source_url), check (source_channel in ('source_urls_field','source_url_field','body_text','manual')), check (normalized_source_url ~* '^https?://') ); create table public.xauto_author ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), platform text not null default 'x', platform_author_id text, handle text, display_name text, profile_url text, normalized_key text not null, created_at timestamptz not null default now(), updated_at timestamptz not null default now(), unique (platform, normalized_key), check (platform in ('x','x.com','twitter')) ); create table public.xauto_quote_reference ( id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), post_id uuid not null references public.xauto_post(id) on delete cascade, source_id uuid not null references public.xauto_post_source(id) on delete cascade, author_id uuid references public.xauto_author(id), quote_excerpt text, quote_excerpt_hash char(64), quote_url text, published_at timestamptz, language text, language_confidence numeric(4,2), credibility xauto_quote_credibility not null default 'self_reported', validated_at timestamptz, validation_result xauto_validation_result not null default 'warn', created_at timestamptz not null default now(), updated_at timestamptz not null default now(), unique (post_id, source_id, coalesce(quote_excerpt_hash, '')), c...
